name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Localize video text overlays into any language without rebuilding your visuals.
problem: Businesses expanding into new markets must recreate entire video assets just to translate on-screen text, wasting time and design resources. Visual Translate automates the detection and replacement of text within video frames, preserving the original layout and aesthetics. This removes the bottleneck of manual redesign when localizing video content at scale.
useCases: Localize product demo videos for international markets without redesigning slide overlays
Translate training or onboarding videos into multiple languages for global teams
Adapt marketing campaign videos for regional audiences by swapping text elements
Localize social media video content with text graphics for non-English speaking audiences
